title: ANSEP Students Get a Taste of Entrepreneurship with Alaska SBDC!
summary: Get ready to meet the next generation of entrepreneurs! The Alaska Small Business Development Center (Alaska SBDC) is partnering with the Alaska Native Science and Engineering Program (ANSEP) High School Acceleration Academy for Career Exploration Week. title: Petersburg students petition Borough Assembly to support local schools
summary: A group of eight Petersburg High School students sat in on a Borough Assembly meeting on April 15 in support of increased education funding. (Photo by Shelby Herbert/KFSK) Petersburg’s April 15 Borough Assembly meeting drew a small crowd to the Assembly Chambers. A group of eight high school students sat in on the meeting. title: Petersburg Borough Assembly to look at ordinance to raise tax on room rentals at today’s assembly meeting
summary: Petersburg’s Borough Assembly is scheduled to witness a long-delayed award ceremony at its meeting today at noon. title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: May 2, 2024
summary: May 2, 2024: The sea ice has continued to decrease this week at a higher rate of 3.15% (as opposed to last week’s decrease rate of 1.95%), from the level on 04/25/2024 of 13.809 M km 2 to 13.374 M km 2 for this week.
